description:
Add weapons to the cargo space of vehicles, which can be taken out by infantry units. Ignores available cargo space.
{{Feature|arma3|In {{arma3}}, arguments for this command must be local ({{Icon|localArgument|32}}). For global variant see [[addWeaponCargoGlobal]].}}
name: addWeaponCargo

Item.desc: vehicle to which add the weapons
Item.name: vehicleName

Item.desc: weapon name. See [[:Category:Weapons]] for reference about possible values
Item.name: weaponName

Item.desc: number of weapons to add. {{GVI|arma3|2.14|size= 0.75}} negative count will remove weapons.
Item.name: count
